channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: South Carolina’s governor should appoint Graham’s sister to finish his term, Trump says
item.description: President Donald Trump says South Carolina’s governor should appoint Lindsey Graham’s sister to finish his term that ends in January.

item.title: Aortic tear blamed in Sen. Lindsey Graham’s sudden death is a fast-killing emergency
ICE agent shoots and kills a motorist in Biddeford, Maine, Sen. Angus King says
